item.name: Shooting Starscale
item.description:
This moderately sized fish can be found plying the waters of Chirwagur Lake.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Folklore describes this wavekin as the remnant of a fallen star come to life, from an era in which the skies above Tural blazed with meteor showers. Indeed, when seen glinting in the water on a moonlit night, it is easily confused for the reflection of a comet arcing across the heavens.
